# CleanAlta Thailand - Drone Cleaning Services
# https://dronecleaningthailand.com

## About
CleanAlta Thailand provides professional drone cleaning services for building facades, glass, roofs and hard-to-access structures in Thailand. Services cover Bangkok, Phuket, Koh Samui, Krabi and Chiang Mai. CAAT compliant. 10+ years experience.

## Services
- Drone Facade & Roof Cleaning
- Drone Glass & Window Cleaning  
- Pure Water (DI) Cleaning
- High-Pressure Drone Cleaning
- Low-Pressure Drone Cleaning
- Drone Building Inspection (visual + thermal)

## Key Facts
- 40% cheaper than scaffolding
- 1,000-1,500 m²/hour coverage
- Zero height-work risk (ground-based operation)
- CAAT and NBTC compliant
- THB 2,000,000 insured
- Pure water heated to 70°C
- Proof Pack documentation included

## Contact
- Email: thailand@cleanalta.com
- WhatsApp: +33 6 63 43 78 40
- LINE: @cleanalta
- Website: https://dronecleaningthailand.com
